required_behavior: Dispatch Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet id 0x12 to a packet decoder that reads the official ClientboundContainerSetContentPacket empty fixture body 077b0000 as container id 7, state id 123, zero item entries, empty carried item, and consumes the full body.
forbidden: Do not edit oracle answers or expected bytes.

Do not broaden the change beyond the allowed_write_scope.
Do not implement non-empty ItemStack/component registry handling, menu lifecycle behavior, inventory state, or initialized game-state behavior.
stop_boundary: This fix is only for Play clientbound minecraft:container_set_content / 0x12 packet dispatch/decode for one official empty item list and empty carried item fixture. It does not prove non-empty ItemStack/component registry handling, menu lifecycle behavior, inventory state, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
